products.name: Platinum Series®
products.descriptor: Sealed recombinant-gas lead-acid aviation battery line

evidence.snippet: Recognized and respected for over forty years of advanced battery design, Concorde Battery Corporation steadily built the reputation for engineering and crafting THE premium Recombinant Gas (RG®) lead acid aviation battery. Founded on a tradition of excellence, Concorde’s Platinum Series® sealed lead acid batteries are universally recognized.
